description: Minimal test project for wave execution and merger — 3 epics editing the same utils.js file

epics.title: Bootstrap utils module
epics.description: Create the initial utils.js file with a basic add function and a test file

userStories.title: Create utils.js with add()
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a utils.js file with an exported add(a, b) function so other epics have a base to extend.
acceptanceCriteria: Exports a function add(a, b) that returns a + b
Running node utils.test.js exits with code 0

epics.title: Add multiply function
epics.description: Extend utils.js with a multiply(a, b) function

userStories.title: multiply() in utils.js
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a multiply(a, b) function exported from utils.js.
acceptanceCriteria: utils.js exports multiply(a, b) that returns a * b
Running node utils.test.js exits with code 0

epics.title: Add capitalize function
epics.description: Extend utils.js with a capitalize(str) string utility

userStories.title: capitalize() in utils.js
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a capitalize(str) function exported from utils.js.
acceptanceCriteria: utils.js exports capitalize(str) that uppercases the first character and lowercases the rest
Running node utils.test.js exits with code 0
